prestazioni: Replacement of the original TAG-P01 (TTE PO1) 1.5L V6 turbocharged engine with a bespoke **Cosworth-TAG 1.5L V6 twin-turbo** built to **1,200+ hp** using **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rods**, and a **billet crankshaft** machined by **Arrow Precision**. Pair with **Garrett GTX5533R turbos** (84mm inducer, 110mm exducer) on **custom 3D-printed Inconel exhaust manifolds** by **Sparco Engineering**, feeding into a **custom 4-2-1 equal-length header** with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for 4.5 bar peak pressure.

Full **Xtrac P1042 6-speed sequential transaxle** with **AP Racing carbon-carbon clutch** (3-plate, 1400Nm capacity) and **Hewland LSD (40% lock)**. Replace the stock **McLaren-designed hydraulic shift system** with a **Magneti Marelli electro-pneumatic paddle-shift actuator** (0.02s shift times) and **Motec M190 ECU** for launch control and traction management, calibrated by **McLaren Applied Technologies** for F1-grade torque vectoring.

Chassis reinforcement via **T45 steel roll cage** (FIA 8862-2018 spec) by **Sparco Pro2000**, integrated with **Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 200mm travel) and **Eibach ERS springs** (500lb/in front, 600lb/in rear). Replace stock **McLaren carbon-fiber monocoque** subframes with **3D-printed titanium lattice structures** by **DMG Mori**, reducing weight by 18kg while increasing torsional rigidity by 32%.
estetica: Full **RML Group MP4/2B-inspired aero kit**, including **carbon-fiber front splitter** with **active Gurney flaps** (adjustable via **Bosch Servo Motors**), **rear diffuser with 9-stage vortex generators** (tested in **Sauber F1 wind tunnel**), and **shark fin engine cover** (3D-printed from **Toray T1100G carbon fiber**). Painted in **McLaren Papaya Orange (Pantone 14-1064 TCX)** with **3M Scotchlite reflective vinyl** (FIA 8865-2015 spec) for visibility.

Custom **BBS LM-R wheels** (13x13 front, 16x13 rear) in **gold-anodized forged magnesium** (1.2kg lighter per wheel than stock), wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (245/645-R13 front, 325/705-R16 rear). Brake system upgraded to **Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers** (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with **carbon-carbon discs** (380mm front, 355mm rear) and **Ferodo DS3000 pads**, cooled by **PWR radiators** and **Dymag carbon-fiber brake ducts**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Sparco Pro2000 carbon-fiber bucket seats** (FIA 8862-2018 homologated), **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, and **Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel** (3D-printed **carbon-fiber core**) featuring **Motec C127 dash display** and **McLaren F1-style gearshift paddles** (machined from **aerospace-grade titanium**). Replace stock **McLaren MP4/2 instrumentation** with **AIM MXS Strada data logger** and **RaceGrade GPS lap timer**, integrated with **Bosch Motorsport ABS/TCS**.
